title: M12FeedbackCuratorOutput
description: ZTA task M12 (feedback-to-training curator) chat output -- a draft structured record for human review; needs_human_review is always true, never auto-approved. Model: LiquidAI/LFM2.5-8B-A1B (Together). Prompt: factorylm_ai/tasks/prompts/m12_feedback_curator_v1.txt.

examples.input: the terminal is actually X4:17, not X4:11
examples.ideal_output: [mock-correction] the terminal is actually X4:17, not X4:11
